Introduction
    In this sequel to the hit drama, another tomb-raiding expedition leads the group of explorers beneath the sea. In an ancient Ming Dynasty ship, they encounter monstrous creatures and puzzling traps.

Also known as: The Lost Tomb 2: Explore With The Note
